last_action: Fixed critical dashboard bugs (404/500), corrected main.py logic/indentation, and enhanced UI with notification badges.
summary: Phase 7 stabilization. Added dynamic 'NEW' badges to the admin sidebar for better visibility of pending items. Fixed a 404 error on the 'Send LINE' endpoint and corrected bulk meter recording URLs. Resolved an IndentationError and unreachable code in the meter history logic within main.py. Fixed a 500 error in the lease list by adding null safety for missing associations. The dashboard is now more stable and user-friendly.
next_steps: Verify notification badges update correctly in real-time.
Perform a full regression test of the billing cycle.
Refine the 'Move-out' workflow as previously planned.
Implement building-level filtering for financial reports.

team_notes.Gemini-CLI: Stabilized the codebase by fixing logic errors and adding null safety. Enhanced admin UX with visual cues for pending tasks.
